title: aurelia squarrosa
intro: Aurelia squarrosa, also known as the Hairy Aurelia or Rough-leaved Aurelia, is a species of flowering plant in the family Asteraceae. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Aurelia squarrosa are attributed to its ability to reduce fever, relieve respiratory issues, and treat digestive problems. Aurelia squarrosa can be prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture, and is often used in herbal remedies to promote overall well-being and support the body's natural healing processes.
